    createStandardClient(SmartConfig) - Static method in class com.emc.rest.smart.jersey.SmartClientFactory
    This creates a standard apache-based Jersey client, configured with a SmartConfig, but without any load balancing or node polling.
    createStandardClient(SmartConfig, ConnectorProvider) - Static method in class com.emc.rest.smart.jersey.SmartClientFactory
    This creates a standard apache-based Jersey client, configured with a SmartConfig, but without any load balancing or node polling.
